candidate_hotels.hotel_name: Renaissance Atlanta Waverly Hotel & Convention Center

location_transport.sentence_text: The location is ideal for a trip to Atlanta.
This hotel is in a very nice area of Atlanta about a 1/2 hour drive to the airport.
Convenient to the MARTA so you don't have to battle Atlanta traffic from the airport and to downtown and midtown.
This hotel is conveniently located near great dining and shopping just about 10 minutes from downtown Atlanta.
The hotel is extremely convenient to local businesses plus a host of other major attractions in this part of Atlanta.
Location of hotel is very convenient if you need to be in that area.

target_payload.summary: 以下酒店在位置交通方面有直接正向证据。

reasons.reason_text: 位置适合在亚特兰大出行。

recommendations.hotel_name: Renaissance Atlanta Waverly Hotel & Convention Center

reasons.reason_text: 靠近餐饮购物区，去市中心也方便。

input_payload.query_text_zh: 芝加哥有没有安静、而且整体性价比也不错的酒店？

quiet_sleep.sentence_text: The Conrad Chicago is a quiet oasis just off the Magnificent Mile.
The Conrad is an exclusive, luxury hotel nestled on a quiet street steps away from exciting shopping, restaurants, and the best nightlife.
Also we had to lay everything out that wasn't needed on one of the table tops in order to sleep.
